user_query: For the company behind my most recent open support case, give me a full 360 view

plan.query: For the company behind my most recent open support case, give me a full 360 view
plan.reasoning: The user is requesting a comprehensive overview of a specific company related to their open support case. This requires data from all available agents to provide a complete picture, including communication history, CRM contacts, and any relevant locations.

steps.task: Find the most recent open support case and retrieve its associated company information, including company name and any related contacts.
Using the company name found in step 1, search for any emails and calendar events related to this company.
Using the company name from step 1, search for any physical locations or site information associated with this company.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from all steps to present a comprehensive overview of the company, including communication history, CRM data, and location details.

invoked_agents.input: Find the most recent open support case and retrieve its associated company information, including company name and any related contacts.
